comment.body:
Seems NVDA will pop back up to $97/$98… Will reenter a put there for a target of $90/$91 over the next two weeks. So many calls sold above $100 that it would have to really pump to make it through… or gap.

NVDA’s SEC filing had more disclaimers than a Prednisone commercial. Might be the first quarter that actually sells into earnings instead of pumping.
